title: Smoky Grilled Toast
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines smoky flavors with crispy bread. This recipe is perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the slices of toast with the smoky and argentinian seasonings.
Grill the toast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, cook the rice and noodles according to package instructions.
Serve the grilled toast with a side of cooked rice and noodles.
Optional: Top with any additional toppings of your choice.
